command_intent.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_target_clean_overlay cargo test -p asupersync --lib selected_filter -- --nocapture
command_intent.description: focused lib proof for selected clean path

no_claim_boundaries: does not prove broad workspace health
does not run cargo or rch
does not authorize local cargo fallback
does not permit branches, worktrees, scratch clones, or destructive cleanup
operator_notes: This helper only plans proof inputs; it never constructs a branch, worktree, scratch clone, or overlay directory.
Default mode fails closed on any unselected dirty path, deleted path, or selected dirty path without an active self reservation.
Set report_only=true only for dry-run reporting; report-only output is not proof admission.
